hero_title: We Transport Your Cargo to Every Corner of the World
hero_desc: Grow your business with professional logistics solutions. Fast, reliable and cost-effective transportation services.
fulfillment_section_title: One Partner for All Your Operations
b2c_card_desc: Sell on any platform! BONOLOG picks, packs and ships your orders — so you can focus on what matters most: growing your sales.
b2b_card_desc: Bring your B2B and B2C operations under one roof with omnichannel fulfillment.
services_desc: We meet all your transportation needs with our comprehensive logistics solutions
services_page_desc: We provide professional answers to all your transportation needs with our comprehensive logistics solutions
val_speed_desc: We deliver your cargo as fast as possible with on-time delivery guarantee.
val_trust_desc: We provide safe transportation with years of experience and our professional team.
val_global_desc: We offer access to every point with our extensive network worldwide.
cta_desc: We offer professional solutions for your logistics needs. Contact us for a free quote.
fstat1_desc: Full control over your operations anytime, anywhere.
fstat2_desc: Consistency, speed and accuracy together on standard orders.
fstat3_desc: Right order, right customer, right time — at 99.8%.
fstat4_desc: Global fulfillment infrastructure for cross-border shipping.
howitworks_title: Ready for a Next-Level Fulfillment Experience?
step2_desc: Route your stock to the BONOLOG fulfillment center.
step3_desc: As soon as an order arrives, items are picked, packed and shipped.
step4_desc: Monitor the entire process in real time, step by step.
step5_desc: High efficiency, 100% order accuracy and on-time delivery.
integ_desc: We integrate your store with the marketplaces and e-commerce platforms you use within minutes.
integ_ready_title: Ready to Use Wherever Your Business Is
integ_ready_desc:
Available on leading e-commerce platforms and marketplaces.
Connect your store easily with ready-made integrations, or integrate it into your own system via API.
fo_hero_title: Grow Your E-Commerce, Leave the Operations to Us
fo_hero_desc: Warehousing, packing, shipping and returns — all under one roof. With BONOLOG's fulfillment infrastructure, your orders ship the same day, so you can focus on selling.
fo_hero_b1: No setup fee, integration in minutes
fo_services_desc: We manage the entire operation from the moment your product enters our warehouse until it reaches your customer.
fo_svc1_desc: Barcode-based receiving, addressed shelving and real-time stock visibility powered by our WMS infrastructure.
fo_svc2_desc: Your orders are picked within minutes and prepared with packaging tailored to your brand.
fo_svc3_desc: Advantageous rates through our carrier partnerships, same-day dispatch and nationwide delivery.
fo_svc4_desc: Returns are received quickly, inspected and restored to sellable stock.
fo_svc5_desc: Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon, Shopify and more — all channels in a single panel.
fo_svc6_desc: Sell to 10+ countries with cross-border fulfillment, customs clearance included.
fo_models_title: The Fulfillment Model That Fits Your Business
fo_why1_desc: No hidden costs; you only pay for the storage and transactions you use.
fo_why2_desc: Whether it's 10 or 10,000 orders a day, we operate with the same speed and accuracy.
fo_why3_desc: Monitor stock, orders and shipping status from a single panel, 24/7.
fo_why4_desc: Your products are in safe hands with 24/7 camera surveillance and insurance coverage.
fo_why5_desc: A team experienced in e-commerce operations and a dedicated account manager for you.
fo_why6_desc: Lower your shipping costs with our high-volume carrier agreements.
fo_faq1_q: What exactly does the fulfillment service cover?
fo_faq1_a: It covers all operational processes from the moment your products are received at our warehouse, including storage, order picking, packing, handover to the carrier and returns management. You focus solely on selling.
fo_faq2_q: Which platforms do you integrate with?
fo_faq2_a: We offer ready-made integrations with all leading marketplaces and e-commerce platforms, including Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon, n11, Shopify, WooCommerce, ikas and Ticimax. We can also connect to custom systems via API.
fo_faq3_a: We apply transparent pricing based on storage space and transaction volume. There are no setup fees or hidden costs. Simply fill out the form for a quote tailored to your needs.
fo_faq4_a: Standard orders received during the day are picked, packed and handed over to the carrier the same day. Our SLA is under 24 hours.
fo_faq5_q: Are my products insured in the warehouse?
fo_faq5_a: Yes. All products are stored in our secure, insured warehouses monitored by cameras 24/7.
fo_faq6_q: Is there a minimum order volume requirement?
fo_faq6_a: No. We work with customers of every size, from newly launched brands to high-volume businesses; our infrastructure scales with you.
fo_cta_desc: Fill out the form and our expert team will get back to you the same day with a tailored offer.
fb2b_hero_title: All Your Sales Channels Under One Roof
fb2b_hero_desc: Let BONOLOG manage your shipments to retail chains, dealers and marketplace warehouses. Consolidate your B2B and B2C stock in a single pool and deliver to every channel on time.
fb2b_b1: Bulk shipments by pallet and carton
fb2b_b2: Omnichannel management with a single stock pool
fb2b_feat1_desc: Planning, labeling and on-time distribution of pallet, carton and mixed shipments.
fb2b_feat2_desc: Complete, compliant shipment preparation for Trendyol, Hepsiburada and Amazon warehouses.
fb2b_feat3_desc: Your B2B and B2C orders are fed from a single stock; reduce stock risk with channel-based reservations.
fb2b_feat4_desc: Shipping documents, waybills and labeling processes are prepared in full.
fb2b_feat5_desc: Regular, planned and trackable delivery to chain stores and your dealer network.
fb2b_feat6_desc: Shipment status, stock and performance reports in a single panel.
fb2b_step1_desc: Your products are received with barcode counting and entered into stock.
fb2b_step2_desc: Stored safely in an addressed shelving system with real-time monitoring.
fb2b_step3_desc: Shipment plans and documents are prepared according to your orders.
fb2b_step4_desc: Delivered to recipient points on time with coordinated vehicle planning.
fb2b_cta_title: Let's Talk About Your B2B Operation
fb2b_cta_desc: Share your needs and we will design a tailored omnichannel solution for you.
fdep_hero_desc: Your products are stored safely with barcode-based receiving, an addressed shelving system and real-time stock tracking. Your space flexes with your business; you only pay for what you use.
fdep_b1: WMS infrastructure with real-time stock visibility
fdep_feat1_desc: Incoming products are counted, barcoded and made available in sellable stock within minutes.
fdep_feat2_desc: Every SKU is kept on an addressed shelf, enabling fast and error-free picking.
fdep_feat3_desc: Automatic FIFO management for products with expiry dates and lot tracking.
fdep_feat4_desc: Stock across all your sales channels is updated automatically, eliminating the risk of overselling.
fdep_feat5_desc: Full control with regular counts and detailed stock reports.
fdep_feat6_desc: 24/7 cameras, controlled access and insurance coverage.
fdep_cta_desc: Share your stock details and we will prepare a warehousing offer tailored to you.
fret_hero_title: Turn Returns from a Problem into an Advantage
fret_hero_desc: The returns process is the most critical moment of the customer experience. With BONOLOG returns management, products are quickly received, inspected and restored to sellable stock.
fret_process_title: How Does Our Returns Process Work?
fret_step1_desc: Return shipments are received and entered into the system.
fret_step2_desc: Products are inspected and classified according to their condition.
fret_step3_desc: Eligible products are cleaned and repackaged.
fret_step4_desc: Sellable products are returned to stock within minutes.
fret_step5_desc: Return reasons and product conditions are reported in the panel.
fret_benefit_title: When You Leave Returns Management to Us
fret_ben1_desc: Products return to stock without delay, so no sales opportunity is lost.
fret_ben2_desc: A fast returns process builds customer trust and increases repeat purchases.
fret_ben3_desc: Which product was returned and why — it's all in your reports.
fret_cta_desc: Share your return volume and we will design the process for you.
b2c_who1_desc: Sellers on Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon and n11 who want to free themselves from the operational burden.
b2c_who2_desc: Brands selling through their own e-commerce site that want to keep the customer experience at a level worthy of their brand.
b2c_who3_desc: Businesses with rising order volumes that want to scale without worrying about warehouses, staff or shipping.
b2c_cta_desc: Apply today and have your integration completed in minutes.
menu_fulfillment_desc: Choose the service that suits your needs with our end-to-end logistics solutions
svc_kara_desc: We provide safe and fast road transport services throughout Europe and Turkey.
svc_deniz_desc: Safe shipment to world ports with our expert team in container and bulk cargo sea transport.
svc_hava_desc: We provide fast and safe air cargo transport for your urgent and valuable shipments.
svc_demiryolu_desc: We safely handle long-distance shipments with economical and eco-friendly rail transport.
svc_intermodal_desc: We offer the most efficient logistics solution by integrating road, sea and rail transport.
svc_parsiyel_desc: We offer economical solutions for small and medium shipments with partial load and consolidation services.
svc_fuar_desc: We provide setup, transport and storage services in fair and event logistics management.
svc_transit_desc: We safely transport your cargo to third countries with international transit services.
svc_express_desc: We provide express transport service with 24/7 operations support for urgent deliveries.
svc_ozel_desc: We provide project-based logistics solutions for heavy and sensitive cargo with special equipment.
svc_depolama_desc: We provide inventory management services in a safe and controlled environment at our modern warehouses.
svc_gumrukleme_desc: We manage your import and export processes quickly with customs and consultancy services.
corp_subtitle: Providing reliable and professional services in the logistics sector since 1999
corp_about_p1: BONOLOG has been providing comprehensive logistics services throughout Turkey and Europe since its establishment in 1999. We aim to provide the highest quality service to our customers with our specialized team in road, sea, air and railway transportation and our modern infrastructure.
corp_about_p2: We are a leading company in the industry with over 25 years of experience, extensive partner network and customer-focused approach.
corp_mission_desc: To optimize business processes and contribute to global trade by providing the highest quality logistics services to our customers.
corp_vision_desc: To be the leading logistics company in Turkey and Europe, pioneering the industry with sustainable and innovative solutions.
corp_values_desc: Reliability, transparency, customer focus, continuous improvement and environmental awareness are our core values.
corp_team_desc: We are at the service of our customers 24/7 with our experienced and expert staff.
hr_subtitle: Join the BONOLOG family and shape your career in the logistics sector

hr_form_error: Application could not be sent. Please try again.
hr_open_subtitle: You can apply for the positions below to join our team
hr_ben1_desc: Opportunity to work with our experienced and expert team
hr_ben2_desc: Health insurance, meal card and transportation support
hr_ben3_desc: Training programs and career planning support
hr_job1_desc: We are looking for an experienced operations specialist in planning and management of logistics operations.
hr_job2_desc: We are looking for a dynamic sales representative with B2B sales experience and strong customer relationship management.
hr_job3_desc: We are looking for an experienced customs specialist proficient in customs regulations and import-export operations.
hr_job4_desc: We are looking for an experienced warehouse supervisor with leadership skills in warehouse management and stock control.
hr_job5_desc: We are looking for a specialist with strong communication skills and high problem-solving ability.
contact_subtitle: Contact us for your logistics needs. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

form_error: Quote request could not be sent. Please try again.
footer_desc: We transport your cargo to every corner of the world safely. We are by your side for professional logistics solutions.
b2c_hero_desc: Eliminate the warehouse and order problems that hinder your growth with BONOLOG's e-commerce fulfillment solutions.
b2c_bullet2: Boost your seller ratings on marketplaces
b2c_bullet3: Grow with cost and resource savings
b2c_problems_title: Are You Experiencing Ongoing Problems in Your Operations Without a Solution?
b2c_prob2_desc: Problems in order and stock data
b2c_prob3_desc: Lack of sufficient infrastructure and human resources to manage returns
b2c_prob4_desc: Problematic and slow fulfillment of orders
b2c_prob5_desc: Product damages due to incorrect packaging and consumable selection
b2c_prob6_desc: Unable to access accurate information about processes
b2c_more_desc: Gain a competitive advantage in your industry by perfecting your brand's post-purchase processes with BONOLOG's technology-based fulfillment service.
b2c_feat1_desc: With our warehouse management system, order management system and cargo management system, we make your operations efficient and provide technology-powered solutions.
b2c_feat2_desc: Track all your operational processes on a single platform and gain end-to-end visibility.
b2c_feat3_desc: Benefit from BONOLOG fulfillment service without hidden costs with the per-order payment model.
b2c_feat4_desc: Send your orders with advantageous prices and the best performing cargo companies.
b2c_feat5_desc: Benefit from our fulfillment services at our centers in Turkey and global locations across Europe.
